user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable the survey and set a survey title, so that clients receive a titled satisfaction survey
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Questions screen; When I toggle "Is survey enabled" and enter a survey title; Then the survey configuration is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new survey question with a question type, options and mandatory flag, so that I can capture the feedback I need
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Survey Questions screen; When I click Add new survey question and define the question, type, options and mandatory setting; Then the question is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to create both objective (radio option) and subjective questions, so that surveys capture both rated and free-text feedback
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding a survey question; When I choose the question type as Objective / Radio Option or Subjective; Then the question is stored with the chosen type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the order of questions in the list, so that respondents see them in the intended sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given multiple survey questions exist; When I set the Question List Order; Then the questions are presented in that order

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit or delete existing survey questions, so that the survey stays relevant
acceptance_criteria: Given a survey question is listed; When I click Edit to update it or Delete to remove it; Then the change is applied to the question list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save survey settings or save and continue, so that my survey configuration persists
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured survey settings; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the settings are saved and I proceed as expected
